snippet.title: Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩғШ§ЩҶШҜШ© - Щ„Щ…Ш§ ШөШ§ШӯШЁЩғ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№ЩҒЩҶ ЩҠШ№ШұЩҒ ШЁЩҶШӘ ШӯЩ„ЩҲШ©.. ЩҮШӘЩ…ЩҲШӘ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш¶ШӯЩғ ШЁШіШЁШЁ "ШӯЩ…ШҜЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШәЩҶЩҠ"
snippet.description:

snippet.description:

:Ш§Щ„ЩғЩ„Щ…Ш§ШӘ 
-----------------
ЩҒЩҠЩҮ ЩҶШ§Ші ШЁШӘШіЩҠШЁ Щ„Щғ Ш№Щ„Ш§Щ…Ш©
ЩҒЩҠ ЩӮЩ„ШЁЩғ Щ„ЩҲ Щ…ЩҮЩ…Ш§ ШЁШ№ШҜЩҲШ§ Щ„ЩҒЩҠЩҶ
ЩҲЩҶШ§Ші Щ…Шҙ ЩҒШ§ШұЩӮ ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜЩҮШ§
ЩҒЩҠ ШұЩҲШӯЩғ Щ„ЩҲ ШӯШӘЩү Ш№ШҙШұШ© ШіЩҶЩҠЩҶ 

ЩҒЩҠЩҮ ЩҶШ§Ші Щ…Шҙ ШЁШӘЩӮЩҲЩ„ ШЁШӘШ№Щ…Щ„
ЩҲШ¬ЩҶШЁЩғ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШҙШҜШ© ШӘШёЩҮШұ
ЩҲЩҶШ§Ші ШӯЩ„ЩҒШӘ Щ„Щғ ШӘЩғЩ…Щ„
Щ„ЩғЩҶ ШІЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШұШҜ ШӘШҜШЁЩ„ 

ЩҒЩҠЩҮ ЩҶШ§Ші Щ…ЩҶ ЩӮЩ„ШЁЩғ ШӘШ№ШҜЩ‘ЩҠ
ЩҒШӘШ§Ш®ШҜ ШЈЩғШӘШұ Щ…Ш§ ШӘШҜЩ‘ЩҠ
ЩҲЩҶШ§Ші Щ…ЩҶ ШұЩҲШӯЩғ ШӘЩҮШҜЩ‘ЩҠ
ШӘШҙЩҲЩҒ ШЁЩҠЩҮШ§ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҶЩҠШ§ ШЈШ¬Щ…Щ„ 

ШЁЩҶШҜЩҲШұ Ш№Щ„Щү ЩҶШ§Ші ШҙШЁЩҮЩҶШ§
ЩҲШӯШҜ ШЁЩҶШ§Ш®ШҜ ШұШ§ШӯШӘЩҶШ§ Щ…Ш№Ш§ЩҮ
ЩҶШ№ЩҲШ¶ ЩҒЩҠЩҮ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ ЩҒШ§ШӘЩҶШ§ 
ЩҲЩҶЩҶШіЩү Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ ШІЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШӘШ№ШЁЩҶШ§ ЩӮШіШ§ЩҮ 

ЩҲЩӮЩ„ШЁ ЩҠШ·ЩҠШЁ ЩҠШҜШ§ЩҲЩҠ 
ЩҠШӯШі ШЁЩғЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ ЩҒЩҠЩҶШ§
ЩҲЩҶЩҒШ¶Щ„ Щ…Ш§ШҙЩҠЩҠЩҶ ШЈЩ…Щ„ЩҶШ§

Щ…ЩҲ ШӯЩҸШЁ Ш№Ш§ШҜЩҠ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШіЩ„Ш§Щ…
Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮ ЩҠЩҗЩҖЩҖШ№Щ’ЩҖЩ„ЩҺЩҖЩ… ЩҲШҙЩғШ«ЩҗШұ ...
 ШҙШ§ЩҠЩ„ Щ„Щғ ШЁЩӮЩ„ШЁЩҠ ЩғЩ„Ш§Щ…
 
вҖ”-
 
ЩғЩ„ ШҙЩҠ ШЁЩғ ЩҠЩҶШӯШЁ .. Ш·ЩҠШЁ ЩҲ ШӘШӯШҜЩ‘ЩҠ
ЩҮШЁЩҠШ© ЩҲ ШҙЩ…ЩҲШ® ЩҲ ШұЩҸЩҲШӯ ЩҲШ§ШҙЩҠШ§ ЩғШ«ЩҠШұШ©
Щ…ШҜШұЩҠ ЩҲШҙ Ш§ЩҲШөЩҗЩҒ ЩҒЩҠЩғ ЩҲЩ„Ш§Щ‘ ШҙЩҺШ№ЩҺШҜЩ‘ЩҠ
ЩҲЩ’ЩғЩ„Щ‘Щғ Ш№Щ„Щү ШЁШ№Ш¶ЩҗЩғ ЩҠШ§ ШҘЩҶШӘЩҠ Щ…Ш«ЩҖЩҠЩҖШұШ©
 
ШӯЩҺШөЩ‘ЩҶЩҖШӘЩҖЩғ ШЁЩ’ЩҖЩӮЩ„ШЁЩҠ ЩҲШ§ШӯШ§ШіЩҠШі ЩҲЩҗШҜЩ‘ЩҠ
ШЁЩҗШіЩ… Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ Ш®Ш§Щ„ЩӮ ШІЩҠЩҶЩғ ЩҲЩ’ ЩҶШіШӘШ®ЩҠШұЩҮ
ШІЩҠЩҶЩғ ЩҮШ°Ш§Щғ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ ШҘЩҶШ®Щ„ЩӮ Щ„Щ„ШӘЩҗЩҖЩҒЩҗШҜЩ‘ЩҠ
ШЈЩҒШҜШ§ЩҮ ШЈЩҶШ§ ЩҲЩ’ ЩҠЩҖЩҒЩҖШҜШ§ЩҮ ШәЩҠЩҖШұЩҠ ЩҲШәЩҠЩҖШұЩҮ
 
вҖ”-
 
ШҘШӯШіШ§Ші ШЈШұЩӮЩү Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШәШұШ§Щ… 
Щ…ЩҲ ШӯЩҸШЁ Ш№Ш§ШҜЩҠ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШіЩ„Ш§Щ…
Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮ ЩҠЩҗЩҖЩҖШ№Щ’ЩҖЩ„ЩҺЩҖЩ… ЩҲШҙЩғШ«ЩҗШұ ...
 ШҙШ§ЩҠЩ„ Щ„Щғ ШЁЩӮЩ„ШЁЩҠ ЩғЩ„Ш§Щ…
 
вҖ”-
 
 
ШЁЩғ ЩҠШ§ ШіЩҺШ№ЩҺШҜ Ш№ЩҠЩҶ ЩҚ ШӘЩҖШұШ§Щғ ЩҲЩ’ ЩҠШ§ШіЩҗШ№ШҜЩҠ
ЩҲЩҺШ¬ЩҮЩҗЩғ ШөШЁШ§ШӯЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш°ШЁ ЩҲШҘШӯШіШ§ШіЩҠ Ш·ЩҠШұЩҮ
ЩҲШҙ ЩӮЩҺШҜ ШЈШӯШЁЩ‘Щғ .. Щ…ШҜШұЩҠ ШЁШі ШҘЩҶШӘЩҠ Ш№ЩҗШҜЩ‘ЩҠ
ШӯЩҸШЁЩ‘Щғ ЩҒШ¶Ш§ ЩҲЩ’ ЩҠШ¬ШұЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ ШҜЩ…Щ‘ЩҠ ШЈШ«ЩҖЩҠЩҖШұЩҮ
 
ЩғЩ„ ШӯШ§Ш¬Ш© Щ…ЩҶЩ‘Щғ ШӯЩ„ЩҲШ© Ш№ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩ„ШЁ Ш№ЩҶШҜЩҠ
ШӯШӘЩү Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҖЩҒЩҖШ§ШөЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШЁШіЩҠШ·Ш© ЩғШЁЩҠЩҖШұШ©
ШҘЩ„Ш§Щ‘ ШәЩҖЩҠЩҖШ§ШЁЩғ ЩҠЩҖЩӮЩҖЩ„ЩҗШЁ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШұШӯЩҖШ© Ш¶ШҜЩ‘ЩҠ
ЩҲЩҠЩ’Ш®Щ„Щ‘ЩҠ ЩҮШ§Щ„ШҜЩҶЩҠЩҖШ§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш№ЩҠЩҶЩҠ ШөШәЩҠЩҖШұШ©
 
вҖ”-
 
ШҘШӯШіШ§Ші ШЈШұЩӮЩү Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШәШұШ§Щ… 
Щ…ЩҲ ШӯЩҸШЁ Ш№Ш§ШҜЩҠ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШіЩ„Ш§Щ…
Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮ ЩҠЩҗЩҖЩҖШ№Щ’ЩҖЩ„ЩҺЩҖЩ… ЩҲШҙЩғШ«ЩҗШұ ...
 ШҙШ§ЩҠЩ„ Щ„Щғ ШЁЩӮЩ„ШЁЩҠ ЩғЩ„Ш§Щ…
 
вҖ”-

snippet.title: Perseverance RoverвҖҷs Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: Watch NASAвҖҷs Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover вҖ“ the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space вҖ“ search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASAвҖҷs Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32вҖҷ to tie at one and added two more in the 65вҖҷ and 85вҖҷ. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70вҖҷ to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27вҖҷ by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

#UEFA #ChampionsLeague #UCL #Roundof16 #HatTrick #MBappe #Kean #Messi #PSG #Barcelona #ParisSaintGermain #Barca (edited)

snippet.title: Mars Rover Landing Overview- NOW SAFE ON MARS!!!
snippet.description:
This will be cooler than the Super Bowl. Thanks to Bill and Melinda Gates for partnering with me on this video. Read the 2021 Annual Letter, here: http://gatesnot.es/3cfnMF6

Watch the live stream- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gm0b_ijaYMQ&ab_channel=NASA
Main rover landing page- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/
Cool rover interactive animation of the 7 mins of terror- https://eyes.nasa.gov/apps/mars2020/#/home?id=surface_operations&time=2021-02-18T12:44:05.006-08:00&rate=0
Spin the rover around in 3D- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/spacecraft/rover/

Here is the video about why we should explore space even with problems here on Earth- https://youtu.be/lARpY0nIQx0

Music for the montage-

Explosions in the Sky
(Post-rock, four-member band from Texas.)

First Breath After Coma
https://youtu.be/w0o8JCxjjpM

Your Hand In Mine
https://youtu.be/cdiY6kijYHE

Song at 11:21- Bottles by A Shell in the Pit- https://open.spotify.com/track/0m6GMysIDx3gcQc6TF6HEX?si=FhjTlbBbQKayFrYtrw0dlg

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure SupermanвҖҷs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

snippet.title: Dodge Challenger Demon v Porsche 911 Turbo S - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

ItвҖҷs time for an almighty USA vs Germany drag race! 

MatвҖҷs in the absolutely huge Dodge Challenge Demon, and heвҖҷs lining up against Yianni in the Porsche 911 Turbo S! 

When you compare them on paper, it looks like the Dodge has it in the bag. With a humungous 6.2-litre supercharged V8 under its massive bonnet, the Challenge Demon can put down 808hp and 972Nm! As a result, it seemingly dwarfs the 911 Turbo S, which has a 3.8-litre twin-turbo flat-six, which can produce 650hp & 800Nm. 

But of course, this isnвҖҷt the first time weвҖҷve driven a Porsche 911 Turbo S on this channel, and we know youвҖҷre pretty much guaranteed a 1/4 mile time of less than 10.5 seconds! 

So how do you think this will play out? Will the Dodge be able to put its power down? Or is the Porsche set to grab another victory? 

YouвҖҷll have to keep watching to find out!

Thanks to CS Panda for lending us the Dodge - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCxwBVsAoWWkQjKmSKOx5u2A

snippet.title: ШҙЩҲЩҒ ЩҠЩҲШіЩҒ ЩҲШіШ§ШұШ© ШЁЩҠЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮЩҲШ§ Ш§Щ„ШӯШұШ§Щ…ЩҠШ© ШҘШІШ§ЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…Ш§ШұШ©.. ШөШұЩҠШ® Ш¶ШӯЩғ#ЩҒЩҠ_ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§_ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ
snippet.description:
ШҙЩҲЩҒ ЩҠЩҲШіЩҒ ЩҲШіШ§ШұШ© ШЁЩҠЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮЩҲШ§ Ш§Щ„ШӯШұШ§Щ…ЩҠШ© ШҘШІШ§ЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…Ш§ШұШ©.. ШөШұЩҠШ® Ш¶ШӯЩғ#ЩҒЩҠ_ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§_ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ 

Ш¬ШІШЎ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ„ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„ШұШ§ШЁШ№Ш© Ш№ШҙШұ Щ…ЩҶ Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ #ЩҒЩҠ_ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§_ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ
ШЁШ·ЩҲЩ„Ш© :  ШЁШ·ЩҲЩ„Ш© ШҙЩҠЩ…Ш§ШЎ ШіЩҠЩҒШҢ ЩҮШҙШ§Щ… Ш¬Щ…Ш§Щ„ШҢ Ш№Щ…ШұЩҲ ЩҲЩҮШЁШ©ШҢ ШҜЩ„Ш§Щ„ Ш№ШЁШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШІЩҠШІШҢ Щ„ЩҠЩ„Щү ШЈШӯЩ…ШҜ ШІШ§ЩҮШұШҢ Щ„ЩҠЩ„Щү Ш№ШІ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШұШЁШҢ ЩҲШ№ШҜШҜ Щ…ЩҶ Ш¶ЩҠЩҲЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШҙШұЩҒ 
ЩҠШ№ШұШ¶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§Ш№ЩҠШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ§Щ„ЩҠШ©
 ШҢ.
ЩӮЩҶШ§Ш© cbc Ш№ШұШ¶ ШЈЩҲЩ„ 8 Щ…ШіШ§ШЎ
ШҘШ№Ш§ШҜШ© 2:30 ШөШЁШ§ШӯШ§ШҢ 12 ШёЩҮШұШ§
ЩӮЩҶШ§Ш© cbc ШҜШұШ§Щ…Ш§ 11Щ…ШіШ§ШЎ
ЩҲШҘШ№Ш§ШҜШ© 5 ШөШЁШ§ШӯШ§ШҢ ЩҲ2 ШёЩҮШұШ§
ШӘШҜЩҲШұ ШЈШӯШҜШ§Ш« Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§ ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘШҢ ШӯЩҲЩ„ ШЈШіШұШ© ШҙШ§ШЁШ© Щ…ЩғЩҲЩҶШ© Щ…ЩҶ ШІЩҲШ¬ ЩҲШІЩҲШ¬Ш© ЩҲЩҠШ№Щ…Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШІЩҲШ¬ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩғЩҶЩҲЩ„ЩҲШ¬ЩҠШ§ШҢ ЩҒЩҠЩӮЩҲЩ… ШЁШ§Ш®ШӘШұШ§Ш№ Ш№ШҜШҜ Щ…ЩҶ В«Ш§Щ„ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘВ»ШҢ ЩҲШӘЩӮШұШұ Ш§Щ„ШІЩҲШ¬Ш© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШ¬ШіШҜ ШҜЩҲШұЩҮШ§ Щ„ЩҠЩ„Щү ШІШ§ЩҮШұ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ№Ш§ЩҶШ© ШЁШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ Щ„Щ„Ш№ЩҠШҙ Щ…Ш№ЩҮЩ… ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШІЩ„ШҢ ЩҠЩӮЩ„ШЁ ШӯЩҠШ§ШӘЩҮЩ… ШұШЈШіЩӢШ§ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш№ЩӮШЁ ЩҒЩҠ ШҘШ·Ш§Шұ ЩғЩҲЩ…ЩҠШҜЩҠ.
ШҙШ§ЩҮШҜ Щ…ЩӮШ§Ш·Ш№ Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ #ЩҒЩҠ_ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§_ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ:  


 #2021 #ШҙЩҠЩ…Ш§ШЎ_ШіЩҠЩҒ #ЩҒЩҠ_ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§_ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ
ШӘШЈЩ„ЩҠЩҒ : ШЈШӯЩ…ШҜ Щ…ШӯЩҠЩҠ ЩҲ Щ…ШӯЩ…ШҜ Щ…ШӯЩ…ШҜЩҠ 
ШҘШ®ШұШ§Ш¬ : ЩҲЩ„ЩҠШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ„ЩҒШ§ЩҲЩҠ
ШҘЩҶШӘШ§Ш¬ : Synergy #Synergy ШӘШ§Щ…Шұ Щ…ШұШіЩҠ
ШҙШұЩғШ© ШіЩҠЩҶШұШ¬Щү Щ„Щ„Ш§ЩҶШӘШ§Ш¬ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩ„ЩҠЩҒШІЩҠЩҲЩҶЩү ЩҲШ§Щ„ШіЩҠЩҶЩ…Ш§ШҰЩү ЩҲШ®ШҜЩ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШҘШ№Щ„Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§ЩӮШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш©


Ш§ШҙШӘШұЩғ ЩҒЩү Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҶШ§Ш© Ш§Щ„ШұШіЩ…ЩҠШ© : http://bit.ly/Synergyofficial

snippet.title: ШҙЩҲЩҒ ШІЩҲЩ…ШЁШ§ Ш№Щ…Щ„ШӘ ШҘЩҠЩҮ Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШӯШұШ§Щ…ЩҠЩҮ..ЩҲШҘШІШ§ЩҠ ШіШ§Ш№ШҜ Щ„Ш°ЩҠШ° ШіШ§ШұШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲШ§ЩҒЩҠШұ#ЩҒЩҠ_ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§_ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ
snippet.description:
ШҙЩҲЩҒ ШІЩҲЩ…ШЁШ§ Ш№Щ…Щ„ШӘ ШҘЩҠЩҮ Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШӯШұШ§Щ…ЩҠЩҮ..ЩҲШҘШІШ§ЩҠ ШіШ§Ш№ШҜ Щ„Ш°ЩҠШ° ШіШ§ШұШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲШ§ЩҒЩҠШұ#ЩҒЩҠ_ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§_ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ

Ш¬ШІШЎ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ„ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҠШ© Ш№ШҙШұ Щ…ЩҶ Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ #ЩҒЩҠ_ШЁЩҠШӘЩҶШ§_ШұЩҲШЁЩҲШӘ
ШЁШ·ЩҲЩ„Ш© :  ШЁШ·ЩҲЩ„Ш© ШҙЩҠЩ…Ш§ШЎ ШіЩҠЩҒШҢ ЩҮШҙШ§Щ… Ш¬Щ…Ш§Щ„ШҢ Ш№Щ…ШұЩҲ ЩҲЩҮШЁШ©ШҢ ШҜЩ„Ш§Щ„ Ш№ШЁШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШІЩҠШІШҢ Щ„ЩҠЩ„Щү ШЈШӯЩ…ШҜ ШІШ§ЩҮШұШҢ Щ„ЩҠЩ„Щү Ш№ШІ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШұШЁШҢ ЩҲШ№ШҜШҜ Щ…ЩҶ Ш¶ЩҠЩҲЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШҙШұЩҒ 
ЩҠШ№ШұШ¶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§Ш№ЩҠШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ§Щ„ЩҠШ©

ЩӮЩҶШ§Ш© cbc Ш№ШұШ¶ ШЈЩҲЩ„ 8 Щ…ШіШ§ШЎ
ШҘШ№Ш§ШҜШ© 2:30 ШөШЁШ§ШӯШ§ШҢ 12 ШёЩҮШұШ§

snippet.title: I Spent 100 Hours Customizing The World's Largest PS5 ($70,000)
snippet.description:
I can't believe we spent 100 hours customizing the world's largest Playstation 5 and gave PS5's away to subscribers lol

Hope you enjoyed! Subscribe right now and you'll be a part of the giveaways! Thanks for watching :)

If you're not yet subscribed, I promise you won't regret subscribing! If you're already subscribed, I love you! вқӨпёҸ
Subscribe and you might be picked to be in my next video! It's free and it would genuinely make me super happy if you subscribed! рҹҘә

Subscribe to all our channels!
ZHC Crafts: @ZHC Crafts 
ZHC Shorts: @ZHC Shorts 
MsMunchie: @MsMunchie 

This PS5 is 10 feet tall (3 meters) weighs 500 pounds (227 kilograms) and cost me $70,000 in total! This playstation 5 is insane! We spent over 4 months putting together this video for you!

Follow my socials too!
Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/zhc
Twitter - https://twitter.com/zhc_yt
Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/ZHC/

If you scrolled till the end... i luv u рҹҘәвқӨпёҸ

snippet.title: Billie Eilish: The WorldвҖҷs A Little Blurry вҖ” Official Trailer #2 | Apple TV+
snippet.description:
Witness the incredible rise of Billie Eilish in "Billie Eilish: The WorldвҖҷs A Little BlurryвҖқ as she tours and records the album that changes her life. Watch on Apple TV+: https://apple.co/theworldsalittleblurry

"Billie Eilish: The WorldвҖҷs A Little BlurryвҖқ tells the true coming-of-age story of the singer-songwriter and her rise to global superstardom. From award-winning filmmaker R.J. Cutler, the documentary offers a deeply intimate look at this extraordinary teenagerвҖҷs journey, at just seventeen years old, navigating life on the road, on stage, and at home with her family, while writing, recording and releasing her debut album вҖңWHEN WE ALL FALL ASLEEP, WHERE DO WE GO?вҖқ 

The documentary is from Apple Original Films, in association with Interscope Films, Darkroom, This Machine and Lighthouse Management & Media. Directed by R.J. Cutler and starring Billie Eilish, Finneas OвҖҷConnell, Maggie Baird, and Patrick OвҖҷConnell as themselves. 

Song:

snippet.title: Ez Mil performs "Panalo" LIVE on the Wish USA Bus
snippet.description:
Ez Mil is back on the Wish USA Bus with a live performance of his rap track "Panalo"! The catchy R&B beat expresses the singer's take on Filipino nationalism. 

Follow Ez Mil on social media:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/EazyMil
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ezekielmiller/
YouTube: @Ez Mil 
Twitter: @EzMil27

#EzMil #Panalo #WishUSA
***

Wish USA is an innovative moving music platform based in Los Angeles, California. Like its Philippines counterpart, the Wish 107.5 FM radio station, it strives to be a gateway wherein various musical talents can perform and showcase their music with the world. With the Wish USA Bus, people can now see their favorite artists perform live in an environment open to all.

Launched with the Wish USA Bus, the platform is a much-loved musical experience that advocates in supporting talented musicians from different genres. From Wish 107.5 to Wish USA, Wish has transformed itself from being a music station on wheels to a sought-after musical platform.

For more information, you may contact the following: 
info@wish1075.co 
aromero@wish1075.co 
scos@wish1075.co 

Get more WISHclusive updates:
Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/WishUSAMusic
Twitter: http://www.twitter.com/WishUSAMusic
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/wishusamusic

snippet.title: ШЁЩ…ЩҶШ§ШіШЁШ© 12 Щ…Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩҶ ЩӮЩҒШІШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш·Ш§ШҰШұШ©рҹҳЁ
snippet.description:
Ш§ШіЩ… Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШұЩҲШ№

ШЁЩҠЩҲШӘ ШҘЩҠЩҲШ§ШЎ Щ„Щ„Ш§Ш¬ШҰЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҲШұЩҠЩҠЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ ШҙЩ…Ш§Щ„ ШіЩҲШұЩҠШ§ 
https://alnouri.org/59074

Щ…Ш§ ШҙШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮрҹҳӯШ¬ШЁЩҶШ§ Ш§Щ„10ШЈЩ„Ш§ЩҒ ШҜЩҠЩҶШ§Шұ(30ШЈЩ„ЩҒ ШҜЩҲЩ„Ш§Шұ) ШЁШЈЩҲЩ„ ШіШ§Ш№ШӘЩҠЩҶ
 ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӯЩ…ШҜЩ„Щ„ЩҮвқӨпёҸвқӨпёҸвқӨпёҸрҹҷҸрҹҸҪ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮ ЩҠШ¬Ш№Щ„ЩҮШ§ ШЁЩ…ЩҠШІШ§ЩҶ ШӯШіЩҶШ§ШӘЩғЩ… ЩҠШ§ШұШЁрҹӨІрҹҸҪ
ЩғЩ„Щ…Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш¬Щ…Ш№ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш®ЩҠШұЩҠШ© ЩҠШұЩҒШ№ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШЁЩ„Шә 10 ШЈЩ„Ш§ЩҒ Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҠШ© Ш№ШҙШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Ші 
Ш§Щ„ЩҠ Щ…Ш§Щ„ШӯЩӮШӘ Ш№Щ„Щү ШЈШ¬Шұ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШёЩҠЩ… ЩҲЩҶШіШ§Ш№ШҜ ШЈЩғШ«Шұ Ш№ШҜШҜ Щ…Щ…ЩғЩҶ Щ…ЩҶ ШЈШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҶШ§ 
ЩҲШЈШҙЩӮШ§ШҰЩҶШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯШӘШ§Ш¬ЩҠЩҶрҹҷҸрҹҸҪ 
Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮ ЩҠШӯЩҒШёЩҮЩ… ЩҲЩҠШ№ЩҠЩҶЩҮЩ… ЩҲЩҠШұШІЩӮЩҮЩ… Щ…ЩҶ ЩҲШ§ШіШ№ ЩҒШ¶Щ„ЩҮрҹӨІрҹҸҪ 

ШҙЩғШұШ§ЩӢ Щ„Щғ ЩҠШ§ ЩҒШ§Ш№Щ„ Ш§Щ„Ш®ЩҠШұрҹҢ№ЩҲШӘШ°ЩғШұ Щ…Ш§ ЩҶЩӮШө Щ…Ш§Щ„ Ш№ШЁШҜ Щ…ЩҶ ШөШҜЩӮШ©рҹҢә


ШұШ§Шӯ Ш§ШҙШұШӯ Ш№ЩҶ ЩғЩҠЩҒЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ШұЩғ ЩҒЩҠ Ш¬ЩҲШ§ШҰШІ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§ШіШӘЩҲШұЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩҶШіШӘЩӮШұШ§Щ… ШЁШҘШ°ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҮ
